message:
feat(api): add authorized-key validation to authentication middleware

The authenticate() function and execute_middleware_chain() now accept an
authorized_keys parameter (BTreeSet<String>). API key and bearer token
auth methods verify the presented credential exists in the authorized
set, rejecting invalid keys/tokens. The mTLS principal string is
truncated via utf8_prefix to avoid leaking full cert subjects in logs.
SecurityConfig gains a new authorized_api_keys field. All tests updated
to pass the new parameter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
